task_description: Open Gmail and compose a new email to team@company.com with the subject 'Sprint Review Notes' and attach the file 'notes.pdf'.

task_description: Navigate to weather.gov and find the 7-day forecast for zip code 10001 (Manhattan).

conversation.text: I need to go to weather.gov and look up the forecast for Manhattan (zip 10001).

conversation.text: Forecast page loaded for New York, NY (Manhattan).

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: I can see the 7-day forecast. Let me read and report the key information.

conversation.speaker: Environment
conversation.text:
7-Day Forecast for Manhattan:
Mon: Partly Cloudy, High 42F
Tue: Rain, High 38F
Wed: Cloudy, High 40F
Thu: Mostly Sunny, High 45F
Fri: Sunny, High 48F
Sat: Partly Cloudy, High 44F

Wed: Cloudy, 40F
